13.reason: [Error: sizeof(node *) should be sizeof(node). Allocating size of a pointer instead of the struct causes insufficient memory and undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: sizeof(node *) should be sizeof(node). Allocating size of a pointer instead of the struct causes insufficient memory and undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: sizeof(node *) should be sizeof(node). This allocates memory for a pointer, not the struct itself, causing insufficient memory and potential crashes.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Allocating pointer size instead of node size; should be sizeof(node)
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: malloc size should be sizeof(node) not sizeof(node*); this allocates space for a pointer, not the full struct, leading to buffer overflow and undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Allocates memory for a pointer instead of the struct itself, resulting in insufficient memory allocation and undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  sizeof(node *) allocates memory for a pointer, not the struct itself. It should be sizeof(node) or sizeof(*tem).
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect memory allocation: should be sizeof(node), not sizeof(node *). This leads to undefined behavior due to insufficient memory allocated for the struct.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect memory allocation: should be sizeof(node), not sizeof(node *). This leads to undefined behavior due to insufficient memory allocated for the struct.]

39.reason: [Error: Missing base case for NULL root. Without a check, if a node has only one child, the recursive call on NULL will cause a segmentation fault when accessing root->left. Should add "if(root==NULL) return;" at the beginning.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Missing base case for NULL root. Without a check, if a node has only one child, the recursive call on NULL will cause a segmentation fault when accessing root->left. Should add "if(root==NULL) return;" at the beginning.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for root. If root is NULL, accessing root->left will cause a segmentation fault. Should add if (root == NULL) return; at the beginning.

41.reason: Missing NULL check for the root parameter before accessing its members, which causes a segmentation fault when recursively called on NULL child pointers.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for the root parameter before accessing its members, which causes a segmentation fault when recursively called on NULL child pointers.

62.reason: [Potential null pointer dereference: if n is 0, root remains NULL, and passing NULL to LeftLowPrint will cause a segmentation fault when accessing root->left or root->right.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential null pointer dereference: if n is 0, root remains NULL, and passing NULL to LeftLowPrint will cause a segmentation fault when accessing root->left or root->right.]
